item.title: Dumperino! Reposts? Of course!
item.description:
This one goes with the one above. So wonderful!
Remember when Discovery didn’t suck? It makes me sad to remember what it once was.
Double posted by accident.
Makes me happy to be child-free
A Canadian’s view of America. ?

item.title: The 94th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dump
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild each Mon - Thu between 11am and Noon EST, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's new "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
No, I don't actually call them MeeMays, OR DO I?!?!
Ken M is a National Treasure
#Dump #Meme_Dump #Phone_Dump #AncientMemes #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #EatingAppsTakingNaps #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #EatNamesAndTakeAss #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #HitlerAteBigBagsOfDicks #IfYoureDeadInside #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten (DK Dump) @CodyBurkett (Pippin) @AbbiiStabbii (Images Of Note) @DigiT00l @DumpsterKoala @OhValleyOfPlenty @CeleryMan7 Vol. 1 https://imgur.com/gallery/MKoxsC0 Vol. 2 https://imgur.com/gallery/LuT8Tjh Vol. 3 https://imgur.com/gallery/DwYKbXW Vol. 4 https://imgur.com/gallery/hAKeS7B Vol. 5 https://imgur.com/gallery/sn3GPn1 Vol. 6 https://imgur.com/gallery/X14rMhq Vol. 7 https://imgur.com/gallery/8TycbEB Vol. 8 https://imgur.com/gallery/DUpO8AW Vol. 9 https://imgur.com/gallery/KJJgDnc Vol 10 https://imgur.com/gallery/6nAbX3Z Vol 11 https://imgur.com/gallery/HQcMJFS - This list is getting long as AF f•ck to TBH honest --- After this Dump I'll start cutting the link list down to the last 50ish Dumperoos.

item.title: White Privilege Strikes Again **CW: Sexual Assault**
item.description: Rapist Bowen Turner was out on bond for rape when he raped another young woman. Then Bowen Turner, the rapist, violated his bond from his second rape by going to restaurants, friend’s houses, and to the golf course 19 times. Nothing was done to rapist Bowen Turner for violating his bond. Then, the bow tie wearing smashed pastry looking motherfucker of a judge sentenced him to PROBATION for rape and he won’t have to register as the sex offender he is as long as he doesn’t violate his parole. Call me pessimistic, but I don’t think that holds much water since he was let off the hook — repeatedly — when he violated his bond. Oh, and his first {known} victim, Dallas Stoller, passed away last November so they just… dismissed that case since she wouldn’t be able to testify. The United States legal system is working exactly how it’s supposed to be and it’s FUCKED. As long as you’re a rich, popular, white male with a family reputation (and apparently the name B. Turner), then you are above the law. Article: https://thetandd.com/news/local/crime-and-courts/man-19-guilty-in-assault-probation-sentence-leads-parents-to-question-justice/article_657ac3d4-0aa3-52db-9630-2dcc1aa3bf90.html
item.dc:creator: Cravanicus

item.title: Y'all got some 'splainin to do.
item.description:
https://www.vox.com/policy-and-politics/23021104/texas-abortion-murder-charge-starr-county
It's really incredible that the charges - which were such a brazen overreach in the first place - were dropped in the manner they were, on Sunday. They were originally planning a press conference for Monday, to further explain the indictment. I expected her lawyers to be good, but - what the hell happened? Edit: I'm a former healthcare compliance officer - I hate to be the bearer of bad news, but this case isn't a HIPAA violation. I know it feels like it *should* be, but there is a specific carve-out in the law that allows medical personnel to disclose records to law enforcement. This case is an example of how that gets abused. Talk to your representatives about changing it.
item.dc:creator: ButtersTheCat

item.title: 15 year old Nazi fired
item.description:
This kid ruined his career already
Edit: kid lost his racing license and more to come potentially https://www.motorsport.com/kart/news/russian-karter-loses-racing-licence-nazi-salute/9837571/ "During the extraordinary meeting of the Sports Council of the Automobile Club of Italy - convened to take urgent measures following the unspeakable and unacceptable gesture of the Russian kart driver Artem Severiukhin, on the podium of the European junior kart race in Portimao - is still in progress, we learn that the Board itself has decided the immediate withdrawal of Severiukhin's sports license and has, at the same time, referred him to the Sports Justice so that it can evaluate the definition of further sanctions that fall within its own sphere of competence," the Italian body said in a statement. "Severiukhin has shown a lack of respect not only for the universal values that have always inspired every sport, but also for humanity, dignity and civil coexistence."
item.dc:creator: ElbowDeepInACentaur

item.title: On the 10th of April, 1944, Odesa was liberated from Nazi invaders. Now, exactly 78 years later, Odesa is getting ready to defend itself from genocidal invaders yet again
item.description: Ukrainian refugees in Antalya, Turkey started cleaning up dirty places as a thank you.

item.title: She is a Russian asset
item.description: https://www.bbc.com/news/world-europe-39478066 Where she says that she would life sanctions https://www.rferl.org/a/russian-firm-seeks-to-recover-11-million-loan-from-french-far-right-leader-s-party/30415776.html 11 million loan from a Russian firm https://www.theguardian.com/world/2022/mar/02/french-far-right-leader-marine-le-pen-forced-to-defend-putin-links Borrowed 9 millions from a Russian bank and meet with putin. Outside from the fact that her program is shit and completely undoable, and that it helps the rich a lot. She is a racist asshole, and wants to destroy green energy.

item.title: We see them but they don’t know we’re 120 years in the future. This is why I love film so much.
item.description: But they had an imagination, and stared into the strange lens, curious and wondering.

item.title: Dixie living in her home in Lawndale, North Carolina. “She was born paralyzed. When I adopted her, she had a bone infection. Both her back legs were amputated to save her life. She is happy, healthy, and strong but isn’t a fan of her wheelchair...:
